full_text:
Mi Zhao 麋照
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mi Zhao (麋照). Son of Mi Wei, grandson of Mi Zhu. Mi Zhao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
